mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_info WHERE deleted = 0
AND (clinic_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR principal LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT id, clinic_code, clinic_name, principal, phone, email, region, address, license_no, introduction, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_info WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_info (clinic_code, clinic_name, principal, phone, email, region, address, license_no, introduction, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{clinicCode}, #{clinicName}, #{principal}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{region}, #{address}, #{licenseNo}, #{introduction}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_info
clinic_code = #{clinicCode}, clinic_name = #{clinicName}, principal = #{principal}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, region = #{region}, address = #{address}, license_no = #{licenseNo}, introduction = #{introduction}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
